chunks.speaker: Ben Guo
chunks.text: Sweet. Awesome. Sounds great.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Cool, cool, cool. I'll let you guys go.

chunks.speaker: Ben Guo
chunks.text: Cool. Awesome.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
